contexts.context: ...ears—a cold moisture pervades his body—his heart <mark>palpitates</mark> to bursting—trembling and tottering, every thing...
...ears—a cold moisture pervades his body—his heart <mark>palpitates</mark> to bursting—trembling and tottering, every thing...
...lips, she pressed herself against the portrait, <mark>palpitating</mark>, bewildered, full of strange terrors. Raymon...
